full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #7 (2026-04-20)

PULSE
Health: 0.4558 (C). 882 wallets, 141 contributors. 24 memos today vs 123 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
27 reward payments, 156581 PFT distributed to 18 contributors. Top earner: r9oHNN...Sa32 (21750 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 19,200 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (10,000 PFT). Lowest: r4ahFv...5XyU (9,200 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (70,000 PFT, avg 10,000/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rDVKRN...tyjB (61 memos). 5 new wallet(s) this week. 5 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 83.1%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-03-21): 7544 transactions from 78 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
